Author: Shifty Kiwi
Name: Autominion
Punchline: Dismisses on plot entry, summons on plot exit.
Description: Automatically dismisses a minion when entering a housing plot and summons one when leaving that plot. Main command: /autominion
Changelog: Changes behavior to dismiss on plot entry and summon on plot exit, while keeping the owned-minion selector and current patch 7.45 / API 14 / .NET 10 target.
